title: pouzolzia hirta var. lythroides
intro: Pouzolzia hirta var. lythroides is a variant of the Pouzolzia hirta plant, a type of flowering plant in the nettle family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pouzolzia hirta var. lythroides include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as dried and made into capsules for medicinal use.
